import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a media token"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/uploads/media-token"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



A narrow-scope token (7-day expiry) for reading `/uploads/*` and Immich
proxy URLs via a `?token=` query parameter — for `<img>` tags and video
players that can't send an `Authorization` header. It can only read
media; it is not a session credential.


<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./get-media-token.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  {...require("./get-media-token.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
